svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 138px; height: 1px; padding-top: 140px; margin-left: 342px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #F85552;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'LXGW WenKai Mono'; color: light-dark(#F85552, #E67E80); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

switch.text: rx 与 rw 权限冲突
